platform_name: da Vinci Surgical System (Xi / X / SP / 5)

diagnostic_rules.action: Alert on endowrist surgical instrument. EndoWrist strain-gauge zero-point drift from repeated sterilization (autoclave t
Alert on patient-side manipulator (PSM) joint encoder. Optical encoder disk contamination from OR debris; seal degradation after repeat
Alert on 3D endoscope / vision cart. Endoscope lens thermal expansion from reprocessing causing inter-camera baseline

diagnostic_rules.component: surgeon console master tool manipulator (MTM) haptics
diagnostic_rules.action: Alert on surgeon console master tool manipulator (MTM) haptics. Console network switch degradation; gimbal potentiometer wear; graphics buffer u
Alert on patient cart brake / skid system. Brake pad wear from repeated engagement; floor debris contamination; spring fati

fmea_summary.failure_mode: Force/torque readings drift >5%; haptic feedback inconsistent; instrument fails instrument-qualification self-test
fmea_summary.action: EndoWrist strain-gauge zero-point drift from repeated sterilization (autoclave thermal cycling); wrist cable wear past 1

fmea_summary.failure_mode: Joint position error >1mm; instrument tip deviates from commanded pose; dVRK reports measured_cp drift
fmea_summary.action: Optical encoder disk contamination from OR debris; seal degradation after repeated reprocessing cycles

fmea_summary.failure_mode: Stereo depth degraded; image appears flat or double-vision; dVRK scope calibration fails
fmea_summary.action: Endoscope lens thermal expansion from reprocessing causing inter-camera baseline shift; fiber stress

fmea_summary.component: surgeon console master tool manipulator (MTM) haptics
fmea_summary.failure_mode: Master input latency >30ms; haptic feedback delayed or absent
fmea_summary.action: Console network switch degradation; gimbal potentiometer wear; graphics buffer under load

fmea_summary.failure_mode: Cart drifts on incline; brake engagement delayed >200ms
fmea_summary.action: Brake pad wear from repeated engagement; floor debris contamination; spring fatigue

maintenance_schedule.notes: Recalibrate EndoWrist instruments every 10 uses or if force drift >5%. Verify PSM joint accuracy after each reprocessing cycle.
